High conscientiousness and system justification support a moderate investment in domestic capacity, but low openness and very low extraversion limit enthusiasm for new industrial projects.
High conscientiousness and a dangerous worldview drive support for self-sufficiency, but low openness and moderate economic leftism temper enthusiasm for extractive industries.
